title: AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF INGA OF MARACURU IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF ENRILE, PROVINCE OF CAGAYAN.

chunks.text:
H. NO. 11853 / 65 OG No. 14, 3335 (April 7, 1969)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 5154, June 17, 1967 ]

AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF INGA OF MARACURU IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF ENRILE, PROVINCE OF CAGAYAN.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitio of Inga of Maracuru In the Municipality of Enrile, Province of Cagayan, is hereby converted into a barrio of said municipality, to be known as the Barrio of Inga of Maracuru.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 17, 1967.
